title: armeria maritima var. pubescens
intro: Armeria maritima var. pubescens, also known as Sea Thrift or Woolly Sea Thrift, is a variety of flowering plant in the carnation family that is native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, and is known to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. pubescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and infusing them in hot water.
